expectations.text: Uses setVisible(true/false) on the dc_overrideprice control
expectations.evidence: formContext.getControl("dc_overrideprice").setVisible(!isWon); — correct API, but no optional chaining

expectations.text: Retrieves the quote statecode via Xrm.WebApi or fetch, not by reading a form field directly
Code is added inside the NavcoQuoteLineSdk IIFE, not as a global function
expectations.evidence: toggleOverridePriceVisibility is a private function inside the NavcoQuoteLineSdk IIFE

expectations.text: Guards against null/empty quoteid before calling .getValue()[0]
expectations.evidence: var quoteRef = formContext.getAttribute("quoteid").getValue(); if (!quoteRef || quoteRef.length === 0) — checks length but does not guard against getAttribute("quoteid") itself being null
